experiences.summary: Promoted through progressive leadership roles; most recently serving as an organization-wide expert for mobile application development and system architecture.

summary.item: Spearheaded the technical foundation for a ground-up native redesign of PNC's retail banking application, adopting a future-focused, best-practice derived approach that ensures project resilience against unforeseen executive requirement shifts.
Transformed potential technical debt into intentional architecture by identifying and extending patterns that mandate feature segregation, making haphazard modularization impossible to implement.

Enforced industry best practices (design tokens, color roles, linters) and introduced custom onboarding/troubleshooting scripts to facilitate seamless development across the redesigned app and design library.

Developed a suite of convenience scripts that synchronized developer environments and CI/CD machines within the complexities of PNC's enterprise environment, effectively eliminating environment-drift and "it works on my machine" debugging cycles across the organization.

Architected an interactive Gradle module-generation workflow that enforced project-wide namespacing and templating. By forbidding manual changes at key directory levels, I ensured that new feature modules "funneled up" into the app without impacting the stability of the core application module.
Established foundational code maintenance and development patterns that were adopted by the organization’s change management team as institutional policy.
Led the technical stack for a flagship Android application supporting 3.5M+ active users, including the architecture and implementation of the in-app mobile payment processing platform.
Served as the primary technical evaluator for third-party integrations; reduced vendor pools from broad fields to 2–3 viable candidates by identifying technical incompatibilities early.
Bridged the gap between business and technology by educating executive leadership on the intersection of technical flows (e.g., OS permissions) and business logic.

Streamlined onboarding procedures by introducing a series of custom bash scripts guiding users through credential setup, repository access, manager permission requests, and final-state environment validation.
Built and deployed a new authentication platform while executing a zero-downtime migration strategy affecting 7+ million daily active users.
Achieved Zelle network integration requirements with QR-code and deep-link integrations.

Pioneered a multi-file Version Catalog solution and 
.kts
migration that kept 
build.gradle.kts
files minimal and auditable, simplifying dependency flow analysis and ensuring consistent app assembly.

Directed a web development crew of 25+ developers at project peak for the online banking platform redesign, laying the groundwork for organization-wide patterns while coaching teammates on best practices in modern web development.
Worked hand-in-hand with designers and product owners to develop the administration portal for the newly launched peer-to-peer payment platform Zelle.
Delivered an Android FIDO authenticator proof-of-concept that spring-boarded the institutional adoption of Samsung Knox and multi-factor authentication (MFA).
Reduced deployment time for brand-specific white-label applications from days to hours through streamlined processes and tool enhancement.

experiences.summary: Worked with elementary students (during the summer) and high school students (during the school year) primarily focusing on Mathematics educational development and growth.
